title: Corrective fix for B-fa05af17-subtask-review: Review Harden bead-state merge safety net
description:
Blocked reason: `src/agent_takt/gitutils.py:113-119` stages `.takt/beads/` conflicts before checking whether other conflicts remain. If a merge contains both bead and non-bead conflicts, the helper returns failure without undoing those staged bead-file resolutions, leaving the repository in a partially resolved merge state. That breaks the documented fallback behavior and is blocking for merge safety.

Remaining work: Fix the mixed-conflict path in `WorktreeManager._resolve_bead_state_conflicts()` / `_merge_with_bead_state_fallback()` so a failed merge does not leave `.takt/beads/` paths partially resolved and staged. Add regression coverage for a merge that contains both bead and non-bead conflicts.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-fa05af17-subtask-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
conflict_risks: The merge-safety tests now depend on real git conflict behavior. Any fix for the mixed-conflict path should update `tests/test_merge_safety.py` alongside the helper logic so the docs' guarantee matches the actual repository state after failure.
